title: Full-Stack POS Terminal
description: Cloud-scale point-of-sale terminal with real-time inventory, barcode scanning, and multi-branch support. Built with Next.js, Express, and MongoDB.

title: Manara Plaza Platform
description: Premium hospitality suite featuring integrated Hotel, Restaurant, and Cafe management with WhatsApp commerce and real-time booking.

title: Dukaan Scan Hub
description: Multi-vendor inventory management system with real-time syncing, global payment gateways, and highly optimized merchant storefronts.

title: Fireshoes Store
description: Premium footwear e-commerce landing page featuring a bold, high-heat aesthetic with optimized product displays and marketing sections.

title: Xamar Pizza
description: Professional pizza ordering platform with a dark, premium visual theme, showcasing a curated menu and streamlined ordering workflow.

title: PRO1 Education Suite
description: Enterprise-grade educational management system with real-time student tracking, automated grading, and resource planning.
